name: Chile Relleno Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse chiles, open flat and remove seeds. Drain on paper towels.
3. Brown beef with onion and garlic in a skillet until no longer pink.
4. In a greased 9x13 inch pan, layer half the chiles evenly across the bottom.
5. Add beef mixture over chiles.
6. Sprinkle cheese mixture (cheddar and Monterey jack) over beef.
7. Pour beaten eggs, milk, and flour mixture over the cheese.
8. Stir in 2 teaspoons cumin and 1½ tablespoons chili powder into tomato sauce.
9. Pour tomato sauce over the casserole.
10. Cover with foil.
11. Bake for 30-45 minutes or until set and golden brown on top.
12. Remove from oven; serve toppings (pecans, raisins) in separate bowls.
